title: Wave 5 operational readiness
acceptanceCriteria: Shared logging redacts secrets and API exposes fast version and Prometheus metrics endpoints
Mini App sessions and launch grants support explicit revoke paths with audit records
Self-hosted compose includes Caddy plus Prometheus/Grafana observability scaffold
Security, observability, backup, upgrade, rollback, and release readiness docs are updated
CI and verification gates cover lint, typecheck, test, build, and task validation
